summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements across backend and frontend. REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3 (backend data models and functions), REQ-4, REQ-5, REQ-6 (admin panel pages), REQ-7 (student dashboard sections), REQ-8 (sidebar navigation and routing), and REQ-9 (migration file) are all substantially implemented. One notable gap is the 'My Attendance Summary' dedicated student section — the dashboard embeds the summary but a separate route and nav item are not evidenced. No significant hallucinated features were found.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-7: My Attendance Summary as a distinct named section with stat cards — while Dashboard.tsx embeds attendance summary data inline, there is no dedicated MyAttendanceSummary page or /student/my-attendance route, and the student sidebar does not include a separate 'My Attendance Summary' navigation item.
missing_requirements.reason: StudentLayout.tsx navItems only add 'My Sessions' and 'My Materials'. The routeTree.ts imports MySessions and MyMaterials but no MyAttendanceSummary page or route. REQ-7 specifies three distinct sections for the student dashboard including a dedicated Attendance Summary section with stat cards.
